title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account preferences and security
languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interface
appearanceDescription: Switch between light and dark. Light keeps screens readable in bright classrooms.
installAppDescription: Install ShuleOS on your phone, tablet, or laptop for quick access and offline attendance support.
avatarHint: Click your photo to upload a new one
notificationsDescription: Lock-screen alerts for messages and class times. Silence here means another period starts without you.
pushActive: Alerts are on for this device.
pushInactive: Alerts are off—class times won't reach your lock screen.
pushNotSupported: This browser can't show push alerts. Install the app on your phone, or use Chrome/Edge.
pushDeniedHint: Notifications are blocked in browser settings. Allow them for this site, then try again.
pushNotConfigured: Push alerts aren't configured on this server yet.
pushNeedsInstall: Install the app (or open a production build) so the service worker can deliver alerts.
pushDisabled: Push alerts turned off on this device
pushDenied: Permission denied—enable notifications in browser settings
pushDisableFailed: Couldn't turn off push on this device
classRemindersHint: Fires like an alarm before each of your timetable periods.
